00000000.00000000.00000000.00000000 

0NNNNNNN.NNNNNNNN.NNNNNNNN.NNNNNNNN 00000000.00000000.00000000.00000000 01111111.11111111.11111111.11111111 
NNNNNNNN.HHHHHHHH.HHHHHHHH.HHHHHHHH 

10NNNNNN.NNNNNNNN.NNNNNNNN.NNNNNNNN 10000000.00000000.00000000.00000000 10111111.11111111.11111111.11111111 NNNNNNNN.NNNNNNNN.HHHHHHHH.HHHHHHHH 

100NNNNN.NNNNNNNN.NNNNNNNN.NNNNNNNN 10000000.00000000.00000000.00000000 11011111.11111111.11111111.11111111 NNNNNNNN.NNNNNNNN.NNNNNNNN.HHHHHHHH 

1110NNNN.NNNNNNNN.NNNNNNNN.NNNNNNNN 11100000.00000000.00000000.00000000 11101111.11111111.11111111.11111111 

1111NNNN.NNNNNNNN.NNNNNNNN.NNNNNNNN 11110000.00000000.00000000.00000000 
11111111.11111111.11111111.11111111

192.168.0.0

192.168.0까지 네트워크
0은 호스트

네트워크 : 24
호스트 : 8

11000000.10101000.00000000.00000000
NNNNNNNN.NNNNNNNN.NNNNNNNN.NNNNNNNN

11000000.10101000.00000000.00000000 = 192.168.0.0 -> C클래스
11000000.10101000.00000000.11111111 = 192.168.0.255

192.168.0.0~192.168.0.255

192.168.0.0 = Network ID/Address
192.168.0.255 = Network Broadcast Address (Broadcast)
192.168.0.1 ~ 192.168.0.254 = Host Address (Unicast)

예제)

172.20.0.0 -> B클래스

10101100.00010100.00000000.00000000
NNNNNNNN.NNNNNNNN.HHHHHHHH.HHHHHHHH
10101100.00010100.HHHHHHHH.HHHHHHHH

10101100.00010100.00000000.00000000 = 172.20.0.0
10101100.00010100.11111111.11111111 = 172.20.255.255

172.20.0.0~172.20.255.255

172.20.0.0 = Network ID
172.20.255.255 = Broadcast Address
172.20.0.1 ~ 172.20.255.254 = Host Address

네트워크 마다 마지막 IP
192.168.0.0인 경우 192.168.0.255 -> Directed Broadcast (랜을 넘을 수 있다.)
255.255.255.255 -> Limited Broadcast (랜을 넘을 수 없다.)

11111111.11111111.11111111.00000000 = 255.255.255.0 = /24

11000000.10101000.00000000.00000001 = 192.168.0.1
11111111.11111111.11111111.10000000 = 255.255.255.128 = /25
NNNNNNNN.NNNNNNNN.NNNNNNNN.NHHHHHHH

11000000.10101000.00000000.00000000 = 192.168.0.0
11000000.10101000.00000000.01111111 = 192.168.0.127

192.168.0.0/25
192.168.0.0 ~ 192.168.0.127
192.168.0.128 ~ 192.168.0.255

192.168.0.0 = Network ID
192.168.0.127 = Broadcast Address
192.168.0.1 ~ 192.168.0.126 = Host Address

예제)
192.168.0.180 /25

192.168.0.128 = Network ID
192.168.0.255 = Broadcast Address
192.168.0.129 ~ 192.168.0.254 = Host Address
